decoded.explanation: The defendant committed a serious breach of fiduciary duty by embezzling funds from their employer, which warrants a punitive response. However, several mitigating factors have been taken into consideration, principally the defendant's lack of any prior criminal history and the proactive effort made to partially repay the stolen funds. A short period of incarceration is appropriate to serve as a general deterrent against white-collar crime and to impress upon the defendant the severity of their actions, while still allowing them the opportunity to return to the workforce to complete full restitution upon their release.
